final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3x3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er from The Legend of Sword and Fairy (仙剑奇侠传赵灵儿), designed for fan art sharing and social media engagement, in the warm, expressive spirit of 3D animation character sheets.

Style/medium: 3D animation character expression sheet with the soft sculptural warmth of Pixar-style rendering, designed for character design reference and fan appreciation
Composition: strict 3x3 grid layout, 9 equal panels, each panel framed by a torn hole in white paper through which Zhao Ling'er peeks, consistent spatial rhythm across all nine expressions
Subject: Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) — young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses, appearing in 9 distinct expressions and actions:
  • top-left: winking expression, adjusting glasses, wearing green sweater
  • top-center: smirking expression, lowering dark sunglasses, wearing red leather jacket
  • top-right: thinking expression, finger on chin, wearing yellow hoodie
  • middle-left: big smile expression, arms resting on edge, wearing black and white striped shirt
  • middle-center: smiling expression, thumbs up, wearing orange button-up shirt
  • middle-right: neutral expression, drinking boba tea, wearing blue sweater
  • bottom-left: happy expression, waving, wearing purple sweater vest over white shirt
  • bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed expression, arms crossed, wearing pink cardigan
  • bottom-right: silly expression, poking cheeks, wearing teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: clean white paper background with torn circular holes creating the peek-through framing device, each hole positioned consistently across the 3x3 grid
Lighting/mood: soft, even studio lighting with gentle shadows, playful and approachable atmosphere that celebrates character personality variety
Color palette: vibrant wardrobe colors (green, red, yellow, black/white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal) against clean white paper, creating a cheerful visual rhythm across the grid
Materials/textures: soft fabric textures for clothing, glossy hair strands, matte paper with torn fibrous edges around each peek-hole
Text (verbatim): 赵灵儿, Zhao Ling'er
Constraints: all 9 panels must be clearly visible and equally sized, consistent character likeness across all expressions, torn paper holes must have organic, realistic edges
Avoid: inconsistent character proportions between panels, flat lighting without dimension, overly symmetrical or artificial tear patterns on the paper
